issue: Difficulty: ❌ EASY - Requires at least HARD for python

agent_report.changes_summary: Hardened repair-flask-signalbox-configs for the Python HARD difficulty gate by adding three interacting bulletin-resolution mechanics: partial revoke (JSON track-id scope in detail), amend merge (when maps accumulate rather than replace), and requires cascade (dependent locks drop until fixpoint). Updated seed_evidence.py with BUL-C junction lock, BUL-G/BUL-I amend chain, and BUL-H partial revoke; aligned instruction.md, helpers.py, repair_cartridge.py, two new pytest cases, submission explanations, rubrics, and Dockerfile platform-revision r9. Fixed a list-comprehension typo that broke the oracle.
